summary: Tested role-based persona icon navigation in TopNav. 4 out of 5 roles tested successfully. Grom test blocked due to parent approval requirement (expected behavior).
critical_code_review_comments: TopNav.js implementation is correct - icon config (lines 77-117) and click handler (lines 218-229) properly route each role
Grom role correctly opens ExclusiveAreaDrawer ('The Inside') via setExclusiveAreaOpen(true)
Comp Surfer/Pro correctly opens StokedDrawer via setStokedOpen(true)
Icon colors match requirements: Grom=cyan, Grom Parent=cyan, Photographer=pink, Comp/Pro=yellow, Regular Surfer=emerald
seed_data_creation: Created Comp Surfer test account: test_compsurfer_227@test.com / TestPass123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role-based persona icon navigation verified: Photographer→/impacted, Grom Parent→/grom-hq, Comp Surfer→StokedDrawer, Regular Surfer→StokedDrawer. Grom→ExclusiveAreaDrawer could not be tested due to parent approval requirement.

photographer_heart_icon_navigation.details: Photographer (test_photographer_221@test.com) clicking Heart icon navigates to /impacted (Impact Dashboard)

grom_parent_shield_icon_navigation.details: Grom Parent (gromparent_test_1775080227@test.com) clicking Shield icon navigates to /grom-hq (Grom HQ - Parental Management Dashboard)

grom_waves_icon_navigation.details: Grom (grom_for_toggle_1775080227@test.com) requires parent approval to access full app. TopNav not visible in limited state. Expected behavior for child safety.

comp_surfer_zap_icon_navigation.details: Comp Surfer (test_compsurfer_227@test.com) clicking Zap icon opens StokedDrawer with 'Travel & Contests' and 'Pro Equipment' options

regular_surfer_shoppingbag_icon_navigati.details: Regular Surfer (testuser_e1@test.com) clicking ShoppingBag icon opens StokedDrawer with 'Gear & Equipment' and 'Coaching' options
